title: QuPath Patoloji Atlası Extension (qupath-extension-atlas)
description:
A QuPath 0.6+ extension that browses and opens the whole-slide images published on patolojiatlasi.com directly inside QuPath.

The atlas serves its slides as Deep Zoom (DZI) pyramids (produced by vips dzsave, shown on the website with OpenSeadragon). This extension adds a DZI image reader to QuPath plus a searchable, category-grouped catalogue driven by the atlas's own image list, and registers .dzi URLs as an openable image type. Slides stream tile-by-tile over HTTP, with nothing to download in advance.

Scope: viewing and study of the published atlas images.
